/usr/bin/ar qc ../../../lib/libvtkextNative.a CMakeFiles/vtkextNative.dir/vtkF3DQuakeMDLImporter.cxx.o CMakeFiles/vtkextNative.dir/vtkF3DSPZReader.cxx.o CMakeFiles/vtkextNative.dir/vtkF3DSplatReader.cxx.o CMakeFiles/vtkextNative.dir/vtkF3DPLYReader.cxx.o
/usr/bin/ranlib ../../../lib/libvtkextNative.a
